# Florida Impact Windows & Doors

> South Florida's premier impact window and door installation company serving Miami-Dade, Broward, and Palm Beach counties. Licensed, insured, and locally owned. We install hurricane-rated impact windows, impact doors, hurricane shutters, and provide complete window and door replacement services.

## Company Information

- Business Name: Florida Impact Windows & Doors
- Address: 3000 Stirling Rd, Hollywood, FL 33021
- Phone: (754) 600-4876
- Email: info@floridaimpactwindowsdoors.com
- Website: https://floridaimpactwindowsdoors.com
- Hours: Mon-Fri 8AM-6PM, Sat 9AM-2PM
- Service Area: Miami-Dade County, Broward County, Palm Beach County, Florida
- Brands Installed: PGT, CGI, ES Windows, Custom Window Systems (CWS)

## Services

- [Impact Windows](https://floridaimpactwindowsdoors.com/services/impact-windows/): Hurricane-rated impact window installation for residential homes
- [Impact Doors](https://floridaimpactwindowsdoors.com/services/impact-doors/): Impact-rated entry, sliding glass, French, and patio doors
- [Hurricane Shutters](https://floridaimpactwindowsdoors.com/services/hurricane-shutters/): Accordion, roll-down, colonial, Bahama, and storm panel shutters
- [Window Replacement](https://floridaimpactwindowsdoors.com/services/window-replacement/): Full-service window replacement upgrading to modern impact glass
- [Door Replacement](https://floridaimpactwindowsdoors.com/services/door-replacement/): Complete door replacement with impact-rated products
- [Energy Efficient Windows](https://floridaimpactwindowsdoors.com/services/energy-efficient-windows/): Low-E coated, argon-filled impact windows for energy savings
- [Commercial Services](https://floridaimpactwindowsdoors.com/services/commercial-services/): Impact solutions for storefronts, offices, and commercial buildings

## Key Information

### Pricing
Impact windows in South Florida typically cost $400 to $1,500 per window installed, depending on size, style, glass thickness, and frame material. Sliding glass doors range from $1,500 to $5,000+ installed. We offer free in-home estimates and flexible financing options.

### Insurance Savings
Impact windows can reduce hurricane insurance premiums by 20% to 45% in South Florida. A wind mitigation inspection is required to qualify for the full discount. Most homeowners see the savings offset a significant portion of their monthly financing payment.

### Florida Building Code
South Florida's High-Velocity Hurricane Zone (HVHZ) covering Miami-Dade and Broward counties requires the strictest impact protection standards in the nation. All new construction and major renovations must include impact-rated windows and doors or approved hurricane protection systems. Products must pass the Miami-Dade large missile impact test (a 9-pound 2x4 fired at 34 mph) followed by pressure cycling.

### Installation Timeline
Most residential impact window installations take 1-3 days. We handle all county permits and inspections. The process includes: free consultation, custom measurement, manufacturing (4-8 weeks), professional installation, and final inspection.

## Service Areas

We serve 88 cities across three South Florida counties including:
- Miami-Dade: Miami, Miami Beach, Coral Gables, Hialeah, Doral, Aventura, Homestead, Key Biscayne, Pinecrest, Kendall
- Broward: Fort Lauderdale, Hollywood, Pembroke Pines, Miramar, Coral Springs, Plantation, Weston, Davie, Sunrise, Pompano Beach, Parkland
- Palm Beach: West Palm Beach, Boca Raton, Delray Beach, Boynton Beach, Jupiter, Palm Beach Gardens, Wellington, Lake Worth, Royal Palm Beach
